'''pathupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidalgoite|hidalgoite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidalgoite|hidalgoite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pathupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæthipith|pæthipith]] || [[word:pæthipij|pæthipij]] || [[word:pæthipish|pæthipish]] || [[word:pæthipi|pæthipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathuthuputh|pathuthuputh]] || [[word:pathuthupuj|pathuthupuj]] || [[word:pathuthupush|pathuthupush]] || [[word:pathuthupu|pathuthupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathuputh|pathuputh]] || [[word:pathupuj|pathupuj]] || [[word:pathupush|pathupush]] || [[word:pathupu|pathupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathufputh|pathufputh]] || [[word:pathufpuj|pathufpuj]] || [[word:pathufpush|pathufpush]] || [[word:pathufpuf|pathufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pathuputhu|pathuputhu]] || [[word:pathupuju|pathupuju]] || [[word:pathupushu|pathupushu]] || [[word:pathupuku|pathupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pathuputh|pathuputh]] || [[word:pathupuj|pathupuj]] || [[word:pathupush|pathupush]] || [[word:pathupu|pathupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pathuputhul|pathuputhul]] || [[word:pathupujul|pathupujul]] || [[word:pathupushul|pathupushul]] || [[word:pathupukul|pathupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pathuputhuthu|pathuputhuthu]] || [[word:pathupujuju|pathupujuju]] || [[word:pathupushushu|pathupushushu]] || [[word:pathupuku|pathupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pathuputhun|pathuputhun]] || [[word:pathupujun|pathupujun]] || [[word:pathupushun|pathupushun]] || [[word:pathupukun|pathupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pathuputhuoro|pathuputhuoro]] || [[word:pathupujuoro|pathupujuoro]] || [[word:pathupushuoro|pathupushuoro]] || [[word:pathupukuoro|pathupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
